title: microgonium tahitense
intro: Microgonium tahitense, also known as Tahitian club moss, is a species of lycopod plant that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate respiratory issues. The health benefits of Microgonium tahitense include its potential to treat coughs, bronchitis, and other respiratory conditions due to its expectorant properties. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
